title: Le passé composé (avoir) — Talking about the past
objective: Recount recent past events using the passé composé with avoir (A2: can describe past activities and personal experiences).

bridge.title: Bridge from Hindi / English: “have + done” = avoir + past participle
bridge.body: The passé composé is built like the English present perfect: **avoir** (present) + a **past participle**. Regular -er verbs form their participle in **-é**: manger → **mangé**, visiter → **visité**. So *j'ai mangé* = “I ate / I have eaten”. Hindi marks the past with separate forms (मैंने खाया), so focus on the two-part French structure: helper verb + participle.

quiz.prompt: What is the main bridge idea for "Le passé composé (avoir) — Talking about the past"?
options: Focus on: “have + done” = avoir + past participle

glosses.kn: ನಿನ್ನೆ, ನಾನು ಒಂದು ದೇವಾಲಯ ಭೇಟಿ ಮಾಡಿದೆ.

example.french: La semaine dernière, j'ai voyagé à Goa.
example.englishGloss: Last week, I travelled to Goa.

glosses.en: Last week, I travelled to Goa.
glosses.ta: கடந்த வாரம், நான் Goa பயணம் செய்தேன்.
